meta.title: Checklist Blues and Control Loop Bars
meta.description:
Kerry Tomlinson’s Unsolicited Response at S4x25 wasn’t a talk. It was a rap.

Ted Lasso, Picasso, red teams, and spaghettis are all aimed at the checklist culture, dead deliverables, and why attackers are still winning.

Smart, sharp, and exactly what S4 is built for.
